name: Virgin Galactic Holdings, Inc.
description: Virgin Galactic Holdings, Inc. is an aerospace and space travel company that focuses on the design, development, manufacturing, and operation of advanced air and space vehicles. The company aims to provide suborbital spaceflight experiences for private individuals and researchers, as well as to conduct scientific experiments in space. By utilizing its proprietary reusable spaceflight systems, Virgin Galactic seeks to open space to a broader range of people and organizations, fostering innovation and exploration while advancing the commercial space industry through its flight operations and related aerospace technologies.
